sections.sectionTitle: David in Israel mi leh Judah mi A Phazah Sim

verses.text: Khatvei, Israel-te tungah Topa hong hehkik a, amah in mite' gimna dingin David hanthawnin, “Pai in; Israel leh Judah mi a phazah sim in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Joab leh amah tawh a om galkap ukte kiangah, “Mite a phazah ka theihna dingin Dan panin Beersheba ciangdong Israel minamte khempeuh lakah pai un la mi phazah va sim un,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Joab in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa' muhin Topa na Pasian in mite tu-a a omzah za khatin a tamna behlap ta hen. Ahih hangin bang hangin ka to kumpipa in hih thu deih na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Ahih hangin kumpipa' kamgente in Joab leh galkap ukte zozaw hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite a phazah a sim dingin kumpipa' omna panin Joab leh galkap ukte a paikhia uh hi
Amaute in Jordan kantanin kuam laizanga om khuapi Aroer panin kipanin Gad lam manawh uh a, Jazer-ah paisuak uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute Gilead tung uh a, tua panin Hit mite' gam Kadesh tung uh hi. Tua lai panin Dan tungin, Dan panin kual pai-in Sidon tung uh hi
Tua ciangin Taia munmuan'huai leh Hiv mite leh Kanaan mite' khuapite khempeuh tung uh hi. Tua panin Judah-te' Negeb lam Beersheba-ah pai uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin gam khempeuhah amaute a pai khit uh, kha kua leh ni sawmnih a cin' khit ciangin Jerusalem-ah hong tungkik uh hi
Tua ciangin Joab in kumpipa kiangah mite a phazah a gawm a pia hi: Israel sungah namsau a tawi galhang mi tul za giat om a, Judah mi tul za nga om hi

Ahih hangin mi a sim khit ciangin David' lungsim in amahmah gimsak hi. Tua ciangin David in Topa' tungah, “Ka gamtatnasa sungah nakpi takin ka khial hi. Ahih hangin, tu-in, Topa aw, nang tungah kong thum hi; na nasempa' mawhna hong maisak in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka hai gamtatkha khin hi,” a ci hi
Zingsangin David a thawh ciangin David' thumupa ahi kamsang Gad tungah Topa' thu hong tung a
“Pai in la, David kiangah hih bangin gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangma tungah thu thum kong pia hi; nang tungah kong hih theihna dingin tuate khat teel in,’ ci hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin David kiangah Gad hong pai-in ama tungah gen a, “Na gamsungah kum thum sung kialpi hong tung ding hiam? Ahih kei leh na galte in nang hong delh laitakin amaute' mai-ah kha thum sung tai ding na hi hiam? Ahih kei leh na gamsungah ni thum sung pulnatna hong tung ding ahi hiam? Tu-in ngaihsun in; kei hong sawlpa' kiangah bang dawn'na puakkik ding ka hi hiam khentat in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in Gad kiangah, “Nakpi takin ka lung a kham hi. Ama hehpihna lian ahih manin Topa' khutsungah tung ni; bangbang ahi zongin mihing khutsungah hong tungsak kei hen,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in zingsanga kipan a kiseh hun dongin Israel-te tungah natna tungsak hi. Dan panin Beersheba dongin mihing tul sawmsagih a si hi

Vantung mi in Jerusalem khua a susia dingin kithawi-in a khut a zan ciangin tua tatsiatna panin Topa kisik a, mite lakah suksiatna na a sem vantung mi kiangah, “Phazo hi; tu-in khawl ta in,” a ci hi. Topa' vantung mi pen Jebus mi Araunah' ancilna gei-ah a om hi

Tua ciangin mite a vat vantung mi a muh ciangin David in Topa' tungah thu gen a, “En in, ka mawh hi; a khialpa pen kei ka hi hi. Hih mite in bang khialhna nei ahi uh hiam? Kong thum hi; kei leh ka innkuante bek gim hong pia in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin tua ni-in David kiangah Gad pai-in ama kiangah, “Paito in; Jebus mi Araunah' ancilna-ah Topa-a' ding biakna tau khat phut in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' thupiak bangin Gad' cihna zui-in David paito hi
Araunah a khuadaksuk ciangin kumpipa leh a nasemte ama lamah a hong paito a mu hi. Araunah paikhia-in a mai lei ngatin kumpipa zahtakna a bawl hi

Tua ciangin Araunah in, “Bang hangin ka to kumpipa a nasempa kiangah hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. “Mite' tung panin gimna a ven' theihna dingin Topa-a' ding biakna tau lamna ding na ancilna mun a lei ding,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Araunah in David kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in hoih na sak bangin la in la biakna pia in; meihal biakna dingin bawngtalte, leh a sing dingin ancilna peekte leh bawngtal kolte hih lai-ah om hi
Kumpipa aw, keimah Araunah in hihte khempeuh kumpipa tungah kong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua banah Araunah in kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa, na Pasian in nang hong sang ta hen,” cithuah lai hi

Ahih hangin kumpipa in Araunah kiangah, “Hilo hi; nangma tung panin hihte a man tawh kituakin kong lei ding hi. Topa ka Pasian' tungah kei' sum beiloin meihal biaknate ka pia kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in ngun shekel sawmnga tawh ancilna mun leh bawngtalte a lei hi

Tua ciangin David in Topa-a' ding biakna tau khat tua lai-ah lam a, meihal biaknate leh thunuama biaknate a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua gam-a' dingin thumna Topa in ngai a, Israel-te' tung panin gimna a veng hi.
